/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/math/vec3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/math/mat4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/voxel/block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/voxel/chunk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/voxel/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/voxel/block_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/voxel/biome.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/voxel/world_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/physics/collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/physics/rigidbody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/save_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/time_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/achievements.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/raycast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/inventory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/crafting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/core/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/network/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/audio/audio_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/voxel_test.dir/src/audio/sound_manager.cpp.o -o voxel_test  -lpthread -ldl
